title: Little Red Corvette
why_this_song: Little Red Corvette by Prince (1982) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Baby, you're much too fast (Oh, oh)
You need a love that's gonna last

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "little" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "little" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "corvette" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "corvette" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Need to find a love that's gonna last

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: By the way you parked your car sideways
Honey, you got to slow down

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Little Red Corvette", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Little Red Corvette", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Little Red Corvette" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Little Red Corvette" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Little Red Corvette" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Little Red Corvette", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: "Little Red Corvette" was released in 1982. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Little Red Corvette" foi lançada em 1982. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
